projects.name: FolioTrack
projects.subtitle: Portfolio Tracker — Angular 19 + ASP.NET Core 10 + MySQL
projects.stackSummary: Angular 19 SPA frontend, ASP.NET Core 10 REST API backend, MySQL database, JWT authentication
projects.description: A personal portfolio tracking application that allows users to monitor stock holdings, track performance, view analytics, and manage a watchlist. Built with Angular 19 (standalone components, signals) and ASP.NET Core 10 API.

projects.name: Offline Invoice
projects.subtitle: Offline-First Invoice System — .NET 6 API + Worker + Dapper
projects.stackSummary: .NET 6 Web API with offline capability, background sync worker, Dapper for data access, SQLite for local storage
projects.description: An invoice management system designed to work offline — locally stores invoice data in SQLite, syncs to a central SQL Server when connectivity is restored. Background service handles sync queue processing.

projects.name: Payment Reminder Service
projects.subtitle: Automated Payment Reminders — .NET 8 Worker + SmtpClient
projects.stackSummary: .NET 8 hosted service that sends automated email reminders for overdue invoices on a scheduled basis
projects.description: A .NET 8 BackgroundService that runs hourly to identify overdue invoices and send reminder emails to clients. Uses SMTP for email delivery, EF Core for invoice data, and idempotency patterns to prevent duplicate sends.

projects.name: CSInvoice
projects.subtitle: Invoice Generation System — .NET 6 + PDF Generation + Unity DI
projects.stackSummary: .NET 6 Windows application for generating, previewing, and exporting invoices as PDF/Word/Excel, using Unity IoC container
projects.description: A desktop-style invoice generation application built with .NET 6, using PdfSharp/MigraDoc for PDF generation, Unity as the IoC container (pre-ASP.NET Core), and SQL Server for storage. Handles complex invoice templates with multiple line item types.

projects.name: Service Selection
projects.subtitle: Angular Web Component + API Versioning — Angular 12 + ASP.NET Core
projects.stackSummary: Angular 12 elements (Web Components) embedded in a legacy HTML page, with a versioned ASP.NET Core API backend
projects.description: A service selection widget built as an Angular 12 Web Component (Angular Elements) that can be embedded in any HTML page. The backend is an ASP.NET Core API with versioned endpoints (v1 for legacy clients, v2 for the Angular component).

projects.name: Wallet Verification
projects.subtitle: Wallet & Identity Verification — Angular 16 + ASP.NET 8 + OIDC
projects.stackSummary: Angular 16 frontend with OIDC authentication, ASP.NET Core 8 API with identity verification flows, wallet management, and optimistic concurrency
projects.description: A financial verification portal where users verify their identity via OIDC, manage a digital wallet (top-up, transfer, withdrawal), and view transaction history. Uses optimistic concurrency for wallet operations to prevent double-spend.

projects.name: CS PM Service
projects.subtitle: Microservices — .NET 6 + 8 Workers + Azure Service Bus
projects.stackSummary: .NET 6 microservices architecture with 8 background worker services communicating via Azure Service Bus, deployed in Docker containers
projects.description: A complex microservices system with 8 .NET 6 background worker services. Services communicate asynchronously via Azure Service Bus. Each service owns its own database. Includes a YARP API gateway, distributed logging (Serilog + Application Insights), and Docker deployment.
